message:
fix(web): fix checkbox animation bug and button docstring

- Checkbox: Remove forceMount and props.checked check that broke
  uncontrolled checkboxes (defaultChecked). Now relies on Radix
  Indicator's natural mount/unmount behavior which works for both
  controlled and uncontrolled usage.
- Checkbox: Add subtle scale animation alongside path draw for polish
- Button: Fix misleading docstring - loadingText doesn't default to
  children, it just shows spinner alone when omitted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
